currentClaim: Bridge Operator Workflow v1 已 accepted：Threadsmith 现在有一条可照着执行的跨 agent 状态桥日常流程，明确 truth、handoff/adapters、proposal、review、adoption、verification 与 closeout 边界。

doneWhenChecklist.label: 新增 Bridge Operator Workflow v1 实施计划
operator guide 收敛成一条可执行日常流程
补充常见外部 agent 角色的可复制提示词
补充 stale / wrong-phase / unsafe / missing-evidence 恢复分支
project truth、skill contract、proposal status、round-trip smoke、fixtures smoke 与 diff hygiene 通过

knownGaps: 这轮仍不做自动多 agent 调度。
当前 bridge 是 local project state store + handoff/proposal workflow，不是 hosted backend 或 direct external write system。
